# Results

This folder contains all output files generated by the training and evaluation scripts.

## Generated Files

| File | Generated By | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `brain_tumor_model.h5` | `train.py` | Saved model weights (best validation accuracy) |
| `training_history.png` | `train.py` | Accuracy and loss curves across Phase 1 and Phase 2 |
| `confusion_matrix.png` | `evaluate.py` | Normalised and count confusion matrices |
| `roc_curves.png` | `evaluate.py` | Per-class ROC curves with AUC scores |
| `sample_predictions.png` | `evaluate.py` | Grid of test images with correct/incorrect labels |
| `class_distribution.png` | `data_loader.py` | Training set class balance chart |

> Note: `.h5` model weights are excluded from version control (see `.gitignore`).
> Run `train.py` to regenerate them.
